PROP-01b-partial-inv-023.text: If eligible asset is assetOut itself, transfer full balance to assetOutReceiver (no auction).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-023.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset == assetOut): transfer(fullBalance, assetOutReceiver), no auctionStart set

locations.note: asset == assetOut branch transfers balance directly to assetOutReceiver without setting auctionStart
